message:
test(server): add 54 tests for tui_focus and tui_poller modules

- tui_focus.rs: 39 new tests (24→63) — FocusContext variants, FocusTarget
  properties, FocusManager lifecycle (empty ring, restore, pop empty stack),
  FocusRingBuilder (button/custom/into_manager), axis_overlap/scale_permille/
  rect_center unit tests, best_neighbor directions, focus_ring_for_screen
  parity, screen-specific panel counts
- tui_poller.rs: 15 new tests (26→41) — DbSnapshotCounts default, SnapshotDelta
  field combinations (projects_list, contacts_list, ack_only, identical
  nondefault), fetch_*_list empty/ordered/aggregate, constants validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
